summary: A detailed intelligence briefing on Edwin Coe LLP and Penningtons Manches Cooper LLP, the two firms that successfully prosecuted the Giambrone group action — the closest legal precedent to the Wincham case. Covers: the Giambrone scheme facts, the litigation timeline (2015 High Court, 2017 Court of Appeal, 2019 PI insurer costs order), the structural parallels to Wincham, verified contact details for both firms including named partners, and a precise pitch strategy for approaching each firm.
